title: Lack of mux folding causes unreachable code which tools complain about
body:
```
circuit MuxTree :
  module MuxTree :
    input clock : Clock
    input reset : UInt<1>
    input c1 : UInt<1>
    input c2 : UInt<1>
    input d1 : UInt<5>
    input d2 : UInt<5>
    input d3 : UInt<5>
    output foo : UInt<5>
    

    node baz = mux(c1,d2, d3) 
    node bar = mux(c1, d1, baz) 
    foo <= bar 
```
Gives
```
module MuxTree(
  input        clock, reset, c1, c2,
  input  [4:0] d1, d2, d3,
  output [4:0] foo);

  assign foo = c1 ? d1 : c1 ? d2 : d3; 
endmodule
```
assigning d2 to foo is unreachable and generates warnings.
